diff:
diff --git a/src/urls.py b/src/urls.py
index ff13c91..339f253 100644
--- a/src/urls.py
+++ b/src/urls.py
@@ -1,2 +1,7 @@
 def join_url(base, path):
-    return f"{base}/{path}".replace("//", "/")
+    # Avoid collapsing scheme slashes while normalizing internal double slashes
+    if base.endswith('/') and path.startswith('/'):
+        path = path[1:]
+    elif not base.endswith('/') and not path.startswith('/'):
+        path = '/' + path
+    return base + path
